transcription.text: and you're still just as handsome what is taking them so long happy anniversary mom and dad happy anniversary grandma grandpa well thank you scott oh here they are it's just beautiful somehow though i hate to see the old color set go when we get that rca anyway around 59 i remember watching john kennedy being elected i remember then a few years later we saw that first super bowl you mean you saw it but for me the most exciting thing was to see those men walk on the moon we're a two-set family now we'll put the old rca up in our bedroom still runs good you know look at that color isn't it beautiful more families on rca xl 100 than any other solid state color tv see the new xl 100s the new reliables from old reliable rca
